urdu transliteration text:
بلغ العلا بكماله
كشف الدجا بجماله
حسنت جميع خصاله
صلوا عليه وآله
english translation text:
He attained exaltation by his perfection,
He dispelled darkness by his luminous beauty,
Beauteous are all his qualities,
Benediction be upon him and his family.

urdu transliteration text:
Yaa Nabi Salaam Alayka,
Ya Rasool Salaam Alayka
Yaa Habeeb Salaam Alayka, Salawaatullah Alayka
english translation text:
Peace be upon you O Prophet,
Peace be upon you O Messenger
Peace be upon you O Beloved,
Allah’s blessings be upon you

urdu transliteration text:
Ashraqal Badru Alayna,
Fakhtafat Minhul Buduruu
Eclipsing all other moons
Mithlahusnika Maa Raaina,
Qattu Yaa Wajhaa Sururii
english translation text:
The full moon has risen upon us,
Such as your beauty we have never seen, No, never, O face of delight!

urdu transliteration text:
Yaa Nabi Salaam Alayka,
Ya Rasool Salaam Alayka
Yaa Habeeb Salaam Alayka, Salawaatullah Alayka
english translation text:
Peace be upon you O Prophet,
Peace be upon you O Messenger
Peace be upon you O Beloved,
Allah’s blessings be upon you

urdu transliteration text:
Anta Shamsun Anta Badruu,
Anta Nurun Fawqa Nuuri,
Anta Iksiruu Wa-ghaali,
Anta Misbahu Suduuri
english translation text:
You are the sun,
You are the full moon
You are the quintessence of existence, You are the lamp in every heart

urdu transliteration text:
Yaa Nabi Salaam Alayka,
Ya Rasool Salaam Alayka
Yaa Habeeb Salaam Alayka, Salawaatullah Alayka
english translation text:
Peace be upon you O Prophet,
Peace be upon you O Messenger
Peace be upon you O Beloved,
Allah’s blessings be upon you

urdu transliteration text:
Yaa Habeebi Yaa Muhammad,
Yaa ‘aruusal khaafiqayni
Yaa muayyad Yaa mumajjad,
Yaa imam al-qiblataini
english translation text:
O My Beloved O Muhammad,
O One who is best of anything in the world
O One who is assisted by Allah, O Exalted
O One who lead prayers to both Qibla

urdu transliteration text:
Yaa Nabi Salaam Alayka,
Ya Rasool Salaam Alayka
Yaa Habeeb Salaam Alayka, Salawaatullah Alayka
english translation text:
